metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for Overthink — the container management experience for you and your AI

plugins.name: ov-core
plugins.description: Daily-ops verbs for managing ov-built containers — start, stop, restart, status, logs, shell, deploy, update. Every consumer enables this.

plugins.name: ov-build
plugins.description: Layer/image authoring verbs for ov contributors — build, image, layer, generate, validate, inspect, list, merge, new, mcp, pull, secrets, settings, eval, migrate.

plugins.name: ov-advanced
plugins.description: Power-user ov surfaces — kubernetes, eval-k8s, vm, libvirt, host-deploy, encrypted volumes, eval probe verbs (cdp, wl, dbus, vnc, spice, record), tmux, sidecar, alias, udev, wl-overlay.

plugins.name: ov-foundation
plugins.description: Comprehensive maintainer reference for foundation layers and base/distro images — pixi, supervisord, cuda, nvidia, fedora, archlinux, debian, ubuntu, plus every layer/image not owned by a specific pod plugin.

plugins.name: ov-dev
plugins.description: Development tools and enforcement agents for Overthink contributors

plugins.name: ov-vms
plugins.description: Virtual-machine consumer skills (libvirt-managed VMs created by ov vm)

plugins.name: ov-jupyter
plugins.description: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for the jupyter image family (jupyter, jupyter-ml, jupyter-ml-notebook, unsloth-studio). Ships the jupyter MCP server (port 8888) for programmatic notebook access with real-time collaboration.

plugins.name: ov-coder
plugins.description: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for the ov coder/dev images (arch-coder, debian-coder, fedora-coder, ubuntu-coder, arch-ov). Ships the ov MCP server (port 18765) for programmatic access to the running pod.

plugins.name: ov-selkies
plugins.description: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for the selkies-desktop image family (Wayland desktop in a container with VNC + Chrome). Ships the chrome-devtools MCP server (port 9224).

plugins.name: ov-openclaw
plugins.description: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for the openclaw image family (multi-variant AI workstation: bootc, full, ml, sway, ollama, browser). Ships the chrome-devtools MCP server (port 9224) on the chrome-shipping variants.

plugins.name: ov-ollama
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for running the ollama LLM-server image. Pair with ov-jupyter to expose Ollama models to Jupyter notebooks via the jupyter MCP.

plugins.name: ov-openwebui
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for the openwebui chat-frontend image. Consumes the jupyter MCP server (enable ov-jupyter alongside) for in-chat code execution.

plugins.name: ov-comfyui
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for running the comfyui image-generation/diffusion image.

plugins.name: ov-immich
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for the immich photo-management image (immich + immich-ml variants).

plugins.name: ov-hermes
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for the hermes agent image (hermes + hermes-playwright variants). Consumes the jupyter MCP server for notebook manipulation — enable ov-jupyter alongside.

plugins.name: ov-filebrowser
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for the filebrowser image (web-based file management on top of an ov volume).
